title: If Eva kept going fun thread
display_title: If Eva kept going fun thread
wikitext:
[]: If Eva kept going.... (fun thread)             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Jul 30, 2009 12:22 am what would have happened and by kept going i mean like became a naruto bleach dbz one piece pokemon thing

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 12:25 am Filler episodes! Asuka and Shinji try to discuss repopulating the Earth. Hilarity ensues.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Thu Jul 30, 2009 12:33 am NickFury90 wrote: Filler episodes! Asuka and Shinji try to discuss repopulating the Earth. Hilarity ensues.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 30, 2009 12:37 am Simple. People come back, everyone who is part of Nerv in the series gets executed or put under house arrest.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:56 am I would laugh. I'd sit through the slice of life shit as Asuka asks Shinji what end of a worm he wants to eat first. "I'd start at the head" "Baka Shinji, both ends are heads" I'd watch the post apocalyptic slice of life shit because, hey, has it been done before? lolno! scarmullet wrote: Misato: HOLY SHIT! ITS THE 223th ANGEL!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:59 am what NickFury90 said! srsly though, I think EoE was made in such a way that it would be impossible for Eva to keep going

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:07 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: what NickFury90 said! srsly though, I think EoE was made in such a way that it would be impossible for Eva to keep going

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 30, 2009 6:50 am If Neon Genesis Evangelion continued to have episodes produced we would see... the eleventeenth angel.

[]:             Quote Post by nora-kun » Thu Jul 30, 2009 8:16 am I suppose it really depends on how they do it... if it was just the series over and over again, eg. OMG LOOK ANGEL 'I hate my life' 'you're a dick Shinji' then, it would be a waste of time.. but if it was a post apocalpytic slice of life then it'd be worth the watch, don't you think..?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji-kun » Thu Jul 30, 2009 8:46 am Shinji would go to mecha pilot college.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Jul 30, 2009 8:59 am I can't believe nobody mentioned " After the End " in this thread yet... complete with the new test plugsuits :) Aside from that, there is the entire "Rebuild is a sequel" theory, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji-kun » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:01 am Rebuild is not a sequel, its a remake.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:02 am if Evangelion would keep going... then we... 1...Would all get insane, cause the human brain can only take that much of mind rape, 2...would be poor as rats cause we would spent all our money on DVD's and action figures and other fan-stuff 3...would start a REAL church of NERV (not like the one in India) cause we're already insane and we need to get money from somewhere. 4...would all starve to death cause one of us gets the stupid idea to make an EVA-movie/series night without pause, wich is bad cause there will be about 5000 episodes and 80 movies including 'the Rebuild of the Rebuild of the Death and Rebirth of the Rebuild of Rebuild of Evangelion in the End of the Rebuild of Evangelion Re-done version of Rebuild of The End of Rebuild of Evangelion director's cut' 5... i will never get married cause i will never have a chance to get over my Asuka-obsession when there is new footage of her every day or week and a girl can only take on a certain amount of Asuka pictures at the back of her head... 6... would find it all (especially me) to be AWESOME !!!

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:05 am Shinji-kun wrote: Rebuild is not a sequel, its a remake.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:31 am All right!!! It's been ages since I've had an excuse to post this. So there's probably lots of noobs who have never seen it. (Note: this has been officially certified by Reichu as nightmare inducing.) Ok, here's my idea for a sequel: Two or three years have passed and many people have returned. Like a snowball rolling downhill, the more time passes, the faster people return. (Most of the important characters are around when the show starts.) Enough people have returned that population centers have been reestablished, and vital services restored. Then, bad things start to happen, when beings resembling Angels start showing up and stomping the fragile new cities. Since we know there are no more Angels, just what can these things be? It seems that this show's bad guys, returned Seele members, have found that while being reembodied they have gained the ability to manipulate their A.T. fields at will and change their shapes. The bad guys can turn into Angels. Fortunately, our heros discover that they have the same ability; they can turn into EVAs. (The original EVAs are obviously not available.) Shinji discovers this ability first, after a ghostly visit from Rei, who shows up only occasionally to offer him advice and encouragement. Things have been going reasonably well between Shinji and Asuka, but sour temporarily when she hears that he has been visited by Rei. ("But, it wasn't like that!!") Eventually she realizes that there is nothing going on between Shinji and the God-like Rei. (Whenever Asuka gets too obnoxious, Shinji jokingly threatens to take Misato up on her offer, though Asuka doesn't take this seriously, because Misato is happy with the reembodied Kaji.) Hmmm...., this sounds like 3-5 episodes already. For about the next 18-20 episodes Shinji, Asuka, and Toji fight another Seele member turned Angel every other episode or so. (Toji doesn't figure out how to re-grow his leg until after his first battle.) With 2-3 episodes left to go, they finally discover that there is a spy among them: Keel has manipulated his A.T. field to disguise himself as Gendo; then the real Gendo reembodies from the LCL and denounces him. At the end of ep. 25, Keel turns into the toughest Angel of them all, but all three pilots and Gendo all turn into EVAs and defeat him. Gendo patches things up with Shinji, (and with Ritsuko, after all, Yui is unavailable. Sorry Maya.), and everyone finally gets to live happily ever after. The last shot is a ghostly vision of Rei happliy watching over them. Note: Kensuke provides comedy relief throughout the series by constantly bitching because he can't turn into an EVA. As Joel would say: "What do you think, sirs?"

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:50 am ath wrote: Shinji-kun wrote: Rebuild is not a sequel, its a remake.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:45 pm DBZ-ish fights, Hot bloodedness, Honor before reason, rule of cool, crowning moments of awesome, crowning moments of funny, hyperspace arsenal, and you fail physics forever would ensue from Eva continuing on. Fillers yes. Movies, specials Ovas, yup. and soem story about the Other Seeds that the FAR planted on other planets getting a wind of the tangific apocalypse in the sol system decide to pay a visit. bringing with them there respective children. More giant mecha and kaiju and now with a twist of little alien lilim in power armor or dressed like space anzis invading earth.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:58 pm Many fan fic writers out there would cry

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:04 pm thewayneiac wrote: As Joel would say: "What do you think, sirs?"

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:18 pm Super Saiyan Shinji. 'Nuff said.
